title: Mariscus boeckeleri
intro: Mariscus boeckeleri, also known as Boeckel's sedge or Cyperus boeckeleri, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Mariscus boeckeleri include flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
